mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refunds (refund_no, order_id, user_id, seller_id, refund_amount, refund_type, reason, description, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{refundNo}, #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{sellerId}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundType}, #{reason}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, e.enterprise_name as seller_name, o.total_amount as order_amount, o.status as order_status FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users e ON r.seller_id = e.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, e.enterprise_name as seller_name, o.total_amount as order_amount, o.status as order_status FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users e ON r.seller_id = e.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE r.refund_no = #{refundNo}

SELECT r.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, e.enterprise_name as seller_name, o.total_amount as order_amount, o.status as order_status FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users e ON r.seller_id = e.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, e.enterprise_name as seller_name, o.total_amount as order_amount, o.status as order_status FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users e ON r.seller_id = e.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE r.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, e.enterprise_name as seller_name, o.total_amount as order_amount, o.status as order_status FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users e ON r.seller_id = e.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refunds WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status IN ('pending', 'approved')
